name: commit-hygiene
description: Detects uncommitted file changes at end of agent turn and steers to commit following project conventions

on_flag.steer: Commit your changes now. Use a detailed, specific commit message that describes what changed and why — aims and intentions, not certainties.

on_new.steer: Commit your changes now. Use a detailed, specific commit message that describes what changed and why — aims and intentions, not certainties.
